user.title: Connect to BusMinder
user.description: Enter the URL of your school or operator's live tracking page. For example: `https://your-operator.com.au/live-tracking/your-school/`

pick_routes.title: Select routes to monitor
pick_routes.description: Choose the bus routes you want to track.

pick_stop.title: Select your stop
pick_stop.description: Choose the stop where you want arrival estimates.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the tracking page. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_busminder: No BusMinder tracking widget found on that page.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
error.parse_error: Could not read data from the BusMinder page. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This route group is already configured.

pick_routes.title: Select routes to monitor
pick_routes.description: Choose the bus routes you want to track.

pick_stop.title: Select your stop
pick_stop.description: Choose the stop where you want arrival estimates.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the tracking page. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_busminder: No BusMinder tracking widget found on that page.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

connection_failed.title: BusMinder connection lost
connection_failed.description: BusMinder has been unable to connect to `{operator_url}` for several attempts. Check that the URL is still valid and that the service is reachable. The issue will resolve automatically when the connection is restored.
